ab: Camak, malim anga aken a masi siquliqulip makaya aken a su pasedjaman?
ch: W:Camak，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Camak, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: neka uta nu niaken, ni Muni aicu.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Muni’s.

ab: saka makaya ku kisedjamen a palamu? palamu sa ku pacikeli tjanusun.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ui, pay lapu.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: maljimalji, pumaljimaljian anga aken uta tjay Muni.
en: Thank you and thank Muni for me.

ab: anema su kinakelekel?
en: May I help you?

ab: muri pacikel aken taicu a drusa sunatj.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: manukemuda, izuanan a su kinakelekel?
ch: A:原來如此，還需要什麼嗎?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: muri kisedjam anan aken taicu a tjelu a sunatj.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: padria. paqenetju nu sipakatjelulj a qadav keljan anga penacikel.
ch: A:好的。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: inia su pacikeli a ku siquliqulip lja.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: ku pinacikel anga tatiav.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: saka aku ika anga mapacucun a ku siquliqulip.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: inika su sinipasedjam anga tjay Camak.
en: Did you lend it to Camak?

ab: qadjav. pay ku kivavadaqay anga timadju.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: aza ku siquliqulip sau kisedjamu anan.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Muni, aicu a uba sini pasedjam pay ni Camak tjanusun?
en: Muni, did Camak lend you this coat?

ab: ini, aicu vinli ni kina tjanuaken.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: aza uba ni Camak mamav kata nisun.
en: Camak’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: aza nimadju a uba qucengecengel, maretimalj a nia quljav.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Muni, nakisedjam sun tjay Camak tua valjitjuq?
en: Muni, did you borrow money from Camak?

ab: Muni, nakisedjam sun tjay Camak tua paisu?
en: Muni, did you borrow money from Camak?

ab: ui, muri ku pacikelen a vuaq a ku varung, ljakua malim aken a masi valjitjuq.
ch: W:是，我本來今天要還他，但是我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: ui, muri ku pacikelen a vuaq a ku varung, ljakua malim aken a masi paisu.
ch: W:是，我本來今天要還他，但是我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: au saka nungida anga su pacikelen?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: ku pacikelav anga nutiav tjaimadju.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ui, ku pusaladjay anga sun a pasasinukukuz tjai Camak.
en: Okay, I will tell Camak for you.
